caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, focusing on "THE DATASET" related to cryptocurrency data. The presenter, dressed in a suit and standing behind a podium, gestures towards the screen as he explains the dataset's contents. The slide displayed highlights that it includes all historical data from the top 100 cryptocurrencies, covering a period from their inception up to September 2017. It also mentions that the dataset comprises 563,871 daily price (close) points. The background of the slide is visually engaging with a network-like design, emphasizing the interconnected nature of the data being discussed. The setting suggests an informative and technical discussion aimed at data enthusiasts or professionals interested in cryptocurrency analysis.
